submission.author: yesbhautik
submission.name: Combined Optimal: Val-Only + Sliding Window + 10L Int6 + Tuned Muon
submission.blurb: Stacks four orthogonal improvements: (1) val-only training for memorization, (2) sliding window eval at stride=64 for maximum-context scoring, (3) 10 transformer layers with mixed int8/int6 quantization to fit under 16MB, and (4) tuned Muon optimizer (momentum 0.99, lower LR 0.02, seq_len 4096, warmdown 3000).

pr.title: Record: Combined Optimal (val_bpb=1.0149) — 4 techniques stacked

submission.author: Daniel Lawson
submission.name: Val-Only 10min
submission.blurb: Baseline 9x512 SP-1024 tied-embedding run trained entirely on the validation shard for 10 minutes on 8 H100 GPUs; score is the final int8+zlib roundtrip metric under the 16,000,000-byte cap.

pr.title: val-only 10min record (val_bpb:1.1111)

submission.author: aquariouseworkman
submission.name: Mixed Quant (int6 blocks + int8 embeddings) + Sliding Window Eval, val_bpb=1.1630
submission.blurb: 3x MLP expansion with mixed-precision quantization: int6 per-row (31 levels) on STE-protected block weights, int8 per-row (127 levels) on embedding, zlib-9 compression, sliding window evaluation at stride=64.

pr.title: Record: Mixed Quant (int6+int8) + Sliding Window, val_bpb=1.1630

submission.author: Jack Princz
submission.name: Wider MLP 3x + int6 Quantization + Sliding Window Eval, val_bpb=1.1659
submission.blurb: 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536) with int6 per-row quantization on MLP and attention weights, int8 on embeddings, zstd-22 compression, and sliding window evaluation at stride=256 with batched forward_logits.

pr.title: Submission: Wider MLP 3x + int6 quant + sliding window eval, val_bpb=1.1659

submission.author: Arjun Krishna
submission.name: ArjunAutoResearch
submission.blurb: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 with MLP_MULT=3.0 (hidden=1536), seq_len=4096, lower LRs (matrix/scalar 0.02, embed 0.03), Muon momentum 0.99, warmdown 3000 steps, int6 per-row quantization on MLP+attention with fp16 tied embedding passthrough, zstd-22 compression, and sliding window evaluation at stride=64 with 4096-token context windows.

pr.title: ArjunAutoResearch: MLP 3x + int6 quant + seq4096 + sliding window. val_bpb 1.1652

submission.author: Takhir Adilzhanov
submission.name: Seq4096 Sliding Window FP16 Tok Coarsen
submission.blurb: A seq_len=4096 9x512 GQA run with tuned Muon hyperparameters, fp16 tok_emb export, and selective block coarsening, scored with stride-64 sliding-window evaluation under the separate evaluation budget.

pr.title: Add seq4096 sliding-window fp16 tok coarsen record

submission.author: samuellarson
submission.name: Warmdown-Quantization
submission.blurb: Long-context training with sliding window evaluation and quantization-aware schedule tuning

pr.title: Long-context sliding window: val_bpb=1.1764

submission.author: Takhir Adilzhanov
submission.name: Seq4096 FP16 Tok Emb + Selective Coarsen
submission.blurb: A 9x512 GQA run trained at seq_len=4096 with tuned Muon hyperparameters and exported under the 16,000,000-byte cap by keeping tok_emb.weight in fp16 and coarsening only one middle block.

pr.title: Add seq4096 fp16 tok coarsen record

submission.author: Kshitiz
submission.name: SP-4096 + Sliding Window Eval
submission.blurb: SP-4096 tokenizer (0.30 tokens/byte vs 0.41) combined with stride-64 sliding window evaluation for better context utilization; 8x512 GQA with encoder-decoder skip connections.

pr.title: 1.1888 BPB via SP-4096 compression + stride-64 sliding window

submission.author: Matthew Li
submission.name: Sliding Window Eval (stride=64)
submission.blurb: Baseline 9x512 SP-1024 architecture with sliding window evaluation at stride=64. Each token is scored with 960+ tokens of context instead of the baseline's 0-1023. Training is identical to the naive baseline; the improvement comes entirely from the evaluation strategy. Post-quant int8+zlib roundtrip under the 16,000,000-byte cap.

pr.title: Record: Sliding Window Eval (stride=64), val_bpb=1.1925

submission.author: sam
submission.name: LoRA TTT
submission.blurb: Naive baseline + per-document LoRA test-time training at eval. Rank-8 LoRA on lm_head/Q/V with Adam lr=0.01, overlapping 256-token chunks in 1024-token context windows. Same training, smarter eval.

pr.title: [record bpb=1.195] sliding window + LoRA TTT

submission.author: Spokane Way
submission.name: Training Opt Seq4096 v1
submission.blurb: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 run at TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=4096 with aggressively tuned Muon optimizer: momentum 0.99, lower LR (0.020/0.020/0.030), 3/4 batch (393K tokens), warmdown 3000 steps, and extended momentum warmup (1500 steps from 0.92). Combines long-context training with training optimization to beat the naive baseline by 0.023 BPB.

pr.title: New SOTA attempt (val_bpb=1.2014)

submission.author: Spokane Way
submission.name: Long Context Seq2048 v2
submission.blurb: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 run at TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=2048 with tuned seq2048 learning rates (0.040/0.032/0.032). This standalone record script reproduces the SXM-verified 10-minute artifact under the 16,000,000-byte cap.

pr.title: SOTA attempt (val_bpb=1.2064)

submission.author: yahya010
submission.name: Seq2048 + FP16 Tied Embedding + Tuned LR
submission.blurb: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 with seq_len=2048, fp16 tied embedding passthrough, MLP hidden trimmed to 960, lower LRs (MATRIX=0.032 SCALAR=0.032 TIED_EMBED=0.04), warmdown=3600.

pr.title: Seq2048 + FP16 Tied Embedding + Tuned LR (val_bpb 1.2067)

submission.author: Will DePue
submission.name: 4-Hour Quasi-10B SP1024
submission.blurb: Unlimited compute track: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 run on pgut3 for 4 hours against the quasi10Bfrom50B 50k-eval export; pre-quant reached 1.1749 BPB at wallclock stop and final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 1.2074 under the 16,000,000-byte cap.

submission.author: Nan Liu
submission.name: 10L Mixed Precision
submission.blurb: 10-layer 512-dim model with lower LR (MATRIX_LR=0.02) and mixed int8/int6 compression: full int8 for first/last 3 layers, int6 (step=4 rounding) for middle layers 3-6. Fits 16MB via better compression while gaining an extra transformer layer over baseline.

pr.title: 10L Mixed Precision: val_bpb=1.2147 (10 layers + int6 middle layers)

submission.author: notapplica
submission.name: NTK Eval + Overtone Init
submission.blurb: Train@1024 with overtone embedding init and phase-transition residual mixing, eval@2048 with NTK-aware dynamic RoPE frequency scaling. AdamW weight decay 0.01, warmdown 2500 steps, tied embedding LR 0.10. Three seed runs (1337, 42, 7) show p=0.0012 for 0.0194-nat improvement over baseline.

pr.title: NTK Eval + Overtone Init (val_bpb=1.2160)

submission.author: Renier Velazco
submission.name: FP16 Tied Embedding + LR/Warmdown Tuning
submission.blurb: Keep tok_emb.weight in fp16 during int8 quantization to eliminate the output-head quantization gap (0.007 -> 0.0005 BPB). Slightly reduce MLP hidden (992 vs 1024) to fit within 16MB. Tune warmdown (3600 vs 1200) and matrix LR (0.06 vs 0.04) for better convergence under the 10-min wallclock cap.

pr.title: fp16 tied embedding + warmdown/LR tuning (val_bpb 1.2197)

submission.author: Nan Liu
submission.name: Lower LR
submission.blurb: Same 9x512 SP-1024 KV4 tied-embedding baseline architecture with lower Muon/Adam learning rates (MATRIX_LR=0.02, SCALAR_LR=0.02, TIED_EMBED_LR=0.03). Systematic LR sweep showed default 0.04 was too high; optimal is ~0.02.

pr.title: 10L Mixed Precision: val_bpb=1.2147 (10 layers + int6 middle layers)

submission.author: Kian Kyars
submission.name: Modal 8xH100 LowerLR FP16Embed 960
submission.blurb: Modal 8xH100 LowerLR FP16Embed 960 on Modal 8xH100 using the current root train_gpt.py snapshot and the published sp1024 export; score is the final int8+zlib roundtrip metric under the 16,000,000-byte cap.

pr.title: Modal 8xH100 LowerLR FP16Embed 960 (val_bpb 1.22395)

submission.author: Chen Liu <chen.liu.cl2482@yale.edu>
submission.name: Naive Baseline + Dispersion Loss
submission.blurb: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 run on pgut1 using the published Hugging Face fineweb10B_sp1024 export and the current train_gpt.py; score is the default final int8+zlib roundtrip metric under the 16,000,000-byte cap.

pr.title: [Partial submission] naive baseline + dispersion loss

submission.author: Baseline
submission.name: Naive Baseline
submission.blurb: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 run on pgut1 using the published Hugging Face fineweb10B_sp1024 export and the current train_gpt.py; score is the default final int8+zlib roundtrip metric under the 16,000,000-byte cap.

submission.author: Kian Kyars
submission.name: Modal 8xH100 Timed Validation
submission.blurb: Non-record submission: a 10-minute Modal 8xH100 run using the current root train_gpt.py snapshot and the published sp1024 export. The run stayed under the 16,000,000-byte cap, but the final int8+zlib roundtrip metric was 1.2296, so it is submitted on the non-record track.

pr.title: Add Modal 8xH100 timed validation non-record submission
[Submission] Warmdown Scheduling - 1.2430 BPB on 8×H100 SXM
Non-record: Depth-recurrent 5x3 d768, val_bpb=1.2663

submission.name: SwiGLU + Warmdown Fix + Quarter Batch (1x5090)
submission.blurb: Non-record 1xRTX5090 submission: systematic 10-experiment exploration discovering warmdown schedule bug, SwiGLU activation, quarter batch sizing, and gradient accumulation. Total improvement -0.035 bpb over stock baseline. Post-quant val_bpb 1.3281 under the 16MB artifact cap.

pr.title: Non-record: SwiGLU + warmdown fix + quarter batch (1x5090, 1.3281 bpb)

submission.author: AntDX316
submission.name: Depth12 Dim416 KV4
submission.blurb: SP-1024 12x416 KV4 tied-embedding run on 8xH100 with a 10-minute wallclock cap; deeper/narrower tweak of the naive baseline that fits under the 16,000,000-byte cap.

pr.title: Add Parameter Golf submission: Depth12 Dim416 KV4

submission.author: Clay Schubiner
submission.name: Deep14x416 KV2 SP1024 MLX 750-step
submission.blurb: Unlimited compute track: a deeper/narrower Apple Silicon MLX run with 14 layers at width 416, 2 KV heads, SP-1024 tokenizer, and 750 training steps on a 10-shard FineWeb subset; final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 1.8440 BPB under the 16,000,000-byte cap.

pr.title: Add Deep14x416 KV2 non-record MLX submission (val_bpb=1.8440)

submission.author: Clay Schubiner
submission.name: Mirror Recurrence (18 logical / 9 unique)
submission.blurb: Non-record Apple Silicon MLX run that mirrors 9 unique transformer blocks across 18 logical layers, keeping the int8+zlib artifact under 16 MB while testing recurrent depth under the challenge parameter cap.

pr.title: Add mirror recurrence non-record submission

submission.author: Taeho JE
submission.name: Adaptive Eval Context MLX WIP
submission.blurb: Non-record local Apple Silicon MLX submission using adaptive eval-time context on a 9x512 SP-1024 KV4 model. In a 200-step fixed-step proxy on 1 train shard and the first 32,768 validation tokens, the adaptive final roundtrip eval scored 2.40284524 BPB vs 2.41303630 for the same setup with standard final eval.

pr.title: WIP: Add adaptive eval-time context non-record MLX submission

submission.author: Bahman Masarrat
submission.name: PhiDelay-Inspired Shared-Recurrent Language Model
submission.blurb: Shared-recurrent PhiDelay-inspired language model with artifact-aware scaling and training-driven optimization under strict size constraints. Replaces self-attention with a lightweight multi-head delay mixer and reuses 3 physical blocks across 4 recurrent passes (effective depth 12) at dim=1024. Final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 3.2306 BPB under the 16 MB artifact cap.

pr.title: PhiDelay Shared-Recurrent LM (3.23 bpb, 6.84MB)

submission.author: TevBenji
submission.name: SubSixteen
submission.blurb: Ternary QAT (BitLinear {-1,0,+1}) + depth recurrence (3 shared blocks x 10 loops = 32 effective layers) + test-time training (1-step SGD on last 2 layers). Three orthogonal multipliers stacked for sub-1.10 BPB.

pr.title: [WIP] SubSixteen: Ternary QAT + Depth Recurrence + TTT (val_bpb pending)

submission.author: Will DePue
submission.name: Int6 + Wider MLP 3x + FP16 Embed + Sliding Window
submission.blurb: Stacking four orthogonal improvements: int6 mixed-precision quantization on MLP+attention weights with zstd-22 compression, 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536), fp16 tied embedding passthrough, and sliding window evaluation (stride=256). Each technique contributes independently to beat the current SOTA.

pr.title: [WIP] Int6 + Wider MLP 3x + FP16 Embed + Sliding Window (est. val_bpb ~1.160)

submission.author: notapplica
submission.name: 10-Layer + Muon WD + NTK Eval + Overtone Init

pr.title: NTK Eval + Overtone Init (val_bpb=1.2160)
[WIP] Depth-recurrent QAT: 3x4 loops, 768d, 15.6MB artifact
Add RecursoLM v0 non-record submission scaffold
RQZ-Golf v1: Depth recurrence for parameter efficiency
[WIP] Recurrent MQA Transformer — depth recurrence + weight tying (nidhilak-Aquarius)

submission.author: Monroe Stephenson
submission.name: Improved Baseline
submission.blurb: SP-1024 5x2=10eff 704dim KV4 depth-recurrence with learned per-recurrence scales; targets sub-1.22 BPB under 16MB cap.

pr.title: Improved baseline: recurrent depth + LoRA + MTP

submission.author: Matt Leonard
submission.name: QAT + Architecture Exploration
submission.blurb: Quantization-aware training with STE to close the int8 quantization gap. Non-record exploration submission pending H100 validation.

pr.title: QAT + Architecture Exploration (Non-Record)

submission.author: Claude
submission.name: QAT + GradClip Conservative
submission.blurb: Training-only improvements on the 9x512 baseline: quantization-aware training (STE) during last 30% of wallclock recovers ~0.007 BPB post-quant degradation; gradient clipping at 1.0 stabilizes training. No architectural changes.

pr.title: Please delete this PR

submission.author: troy
submission.name: Depth Recurrence + SwiGLU (M3 8GB)
submission.blurb: 4 unique layers x3 recurrence = 12 effective layers with SwiGLU MLP at 640 dim. Trained on Apple M3 with 8GB RAM as a proof-of-concept for depth recurrence in parameter-constrained settings.

pr.title: Add depth recurrence + SwiGLU submission (Apple M3 8GB)
[WIP] SP4096: Larger vocabulary for better BPB
